_comment: Thresholds for qc-audio.py post-render audio QC. dBFS/LUFS in decibels. Edit here, not in code.
_hot_note: hot_window is RELATIVE: flags a ~1s window whose RMS is hot_margin_db over the program median (the 'one loud insert' case), robust to overall loudness. abs_peak_dbfs is a separate true-clip guard.
lufs_band_note: lufs_band can be widened to ~1.5 if -14.0 +/-1.0 is too tight for a hand-mixed master
